title: AI Agents: How Do We Take Back Control? | Trailer
summary: A documentary hosted by Alex Kantrowitz examines the gap between AI agent deployment (80% of organizations) and perceived control (10% feel they have control). Research of 750 CIOs and engineering leaders finds only 1 in 3 AI agents in production run with zero human oversight and only 7% of organizations have formal accountability structures.
writeup: This trailer previews a documentary hosted by Alex Kantrowitz on the gap between AI agent adoption and organizational control, a divide that matters as agents move into production faster than oversight structures form. The figures it cites: 80% of organizations have deployed AI agents while only 10% feel they have control. Drawing on research covering 750 CIOs and engineering leaders, it reports that only 1 in 3 agents in production run with zero human oversight and only 7% of organizations have formal accountability structures.
